creator: groenveld@acm.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #84)
Thank you for merging the 6.1.50 updates with @JSM's work.

Windows 11 guest aborts on restore:
00:00:10.355167 !!Assertion Failed!!
00:00:10.355168 Expression: uMarker == VGA_SAVED_STATE_MAKE_MARKER(6)
00:00:10.355169 Location  : /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose70/work/VirtualBox-7.0.24/src/VBox/Devices/Graphics/DevVGA.cpp(6011) int vgaR3LoadExec(PPDMDEVINS, PSSMHANDLE, uint32_t, uint32_t)
00:00:10.355170 Stack     :
00:00:10.355170 0000000825c93273
00:00:10.355171 
00:00:10.355285 Bad VGA marker: expected a72656b72614d36, got 19200102


FreeBSD guest aborts at startx:
00:01:01.526252 !!Assertion Failed!!
00:01:01.526252 Expression: guest-input: screen.u32StartOffset <= pView->u32ViewSize && u64ScreenSize <= pView->u32MaxScreenSize && screen.u32StartOffset <= pView->u32ViewSize - (uint32_t)u64ScreenSize
00:01:01.526253 Location  : /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose70/work/VirtualBox-7.0.24/src/VBox/Devices/Graphics/DevVGA_VBVA.cpp(2295) int vbvaInfoScreen(PVGASTATECC, const volatile VBVAINFOSCREEN *)
00:01:01.526255 Stack     :
00:01:01.526255 0000000823cfb273
00:01:01.526255 
00:01:01.526405 u32StartOffset=0x0 u32ViewSize=0x1ff0000 u64ScreenSize=0x4afed40 u32MaxScreenSize=0x1fe0000

John
groenveld@acm.org
